description: European healthcare provider operating pharmacies, medical supplies distribution, and homecare services across 14 countries. Offers integrated care solutions including medication management, medical devices, and patient support services.
business_model: B2B2C - Pharmacy services, medical supplies to healthcare providers and patients
target_market: European healthcare systems, patients with chronic conditions, healthcare providers
competitive_advantage: Pan-European presence, integrated pharmacy-homecare model, strong logistics network

varden_fit.rationale: Major pharmacy player in Netherlands - potential distribution partner for Varden's occupational health services
